zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily Massey於1502年出生在英國英格蘭爾可努恰福德時，她的父親Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham33歲，母親Alice Whitney37歲。她於1517年與Ralph de Baguley在英國英格蘭爾奧勒頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1530年在英國爾奧勒頓享年28歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾可努恰福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily Massey于1502年出生在英国英格兰爾可努恰福德时，她的父亲Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham33岁，母亲Alice Whitney37岁。她于1517年与Ralph de Baguley在英国英格兰爾奧勒頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1530年在英国爾奧勒頓享年28岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾可努恰福德。

nameMeanings.name: Massey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Massy, a pet form of Matthew . Compare Mace .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one or more of several places in Normandy, such as Macey (Manche), Massy (Seine-Maritime), Macé-sur-Orne (Orne), and La Ferté Macé (Orne).
English: variant of Marsay (see Marcey ).

variants.name: Mace
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Masse, probably a shortened form of Matthew (compare Massey and Massett ) or possibly of Thomas .
French and Breton (Macé): from the French personal name Macé, a vernacular form of Mathieu ‘Matthew’. Compare Masse 5 and Maze 3.

French (Macé): habitational name from Macé or La Ferté-Macé in Orne, the former so named from Gallo-Roman Macciacum (from the personal name Maccius + the locative suffix -acum), the latter from the personal name Macé (see 2 above).

variants.name: Massie
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeen): variant of   Massey  .

variants.name: Marsee
meanings: English: altered form of   Massey  .

variants.name: Massee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Germain.
Possibly an altered form of English   Massey  .
French (Massée): from the feminine form of Massé (see Masse ). This surname is rare in France.

variants.name: Massa
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Sal, Antonio, Silvio, Annamarie, Biagio, Caesar, Carmela, Dante, Elisabetta, Ennio.

Italian: habitational name from any of various places called Massa, for example Massa Lubrense or Massa di Somma, both in Naples province, or Masse d'Albe in Aquila, all named from medieval Latin massa ‘farm, estate’ (from Latin massa ‘mass, lump, pile’, Greek maza). This surname is also found in southern France (see Massey 5).

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Ma(t)thew, a vernacular form of the Greek New Testament name Matthias, Matthaios, which is ultimately from the Hebrew personal name Matityahu ‘gift of God’. This was taken into Latin as Mat(t)hias and Matthaeus respectively, the former being used for the twelfth apostle (who replaced Judas Iscariot) and the latter for the author of the first Gospel. In many European languages this distinction is reflected in different name forms. The commonest vernacular forms of the personal name, including English Matthew, Old French Matheu, Spanish Mateo, Italian Matteo, Portuguese Mateus, Catalan and Occitan Mateu are generally derived from the form Matthaeus. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, including German Matthias , Greek Mathias and Mattheos, Assyrian/Chaldean Matti , Czech Matěj, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Matej . The name Matthew is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Mathai ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Mathew , see also Matthews .

variants.name: Macey
meanings: English: variant of   Massey  .
Americanized form of Slovak and Rusyn (from Slovakia) Macej or Mačej and Polish Maciej , derivatives of the Latin personal name Matthaeus (see Matthew ).

variants.name: Masey
meanings: English: variant of   Massey  .

variants.name: Macy
meanings: English: variant of   Massey  .

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily Massey was born in 1502, in Knutsford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham, was 33 and her mother, Alice Whitney, was 37. She married Ralph de Baguley in 1517, in Ollerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1530, in Ollerton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 28, and was buried in Knutsford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Talgarth, Breconshire, Wales: Talgarth, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily Massey est née en 1502, à Knutsford, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Alice Whitney, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph de Baguley en 1517, à Ollerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1530, à Ollerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 28 ans, et a été enterrée à Knutsford, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily Massey 1502 in Knutsford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham 33 und ihre Mutter Alice Whitney 37. Sie hat 1517 in Ollerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Ralph de Baguley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1530 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Ollerton, Cheshire, England und wurde in Knutsford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ht.Talgarth, Breconshire, Wales: Talgarth, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Massey è nata il nel 1502 nel Knutsford, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Alice Whitney, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Ralph de Baguley nel 1517, nel Ollerton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1530, nel Ollerton, Cheshire, England, all'età di 28 anni, e fu sepolta a Knutsford, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Masseyが1502年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヌトスフォードで生まれた時，父Lord Hamon Massey of Dunhamは33歳，母Alice Whitneyは37歳であった。1517年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオラートンでRalph de Baguleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1530年にイギリスチェシュアイアオラートンで28歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヌトスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Massey(이)가 1502년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 누츠퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Whitney(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1517년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 레르턴에서 Ralph de Baguley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1530년 영국 체실르 레르턴에서 28세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 누츠퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Massey nasceu em 1502, em Knutsford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Alice Whitney, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph de Baguley em 1517, em Ollerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1530, em Ollerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 28 anos, e foi sepultada em Knutsford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily Massey родилась в 1502 г. в местности нуцфорд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Whitney, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph de Baguley в 1517 г. в местности оллиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1530 г. в местности оллиртон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 28 лет и была похоронена в местности нуцфорд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily Massey nació en 1502, en Knutsford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Lord Hamon Massey of Dunham, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Alice Whitney, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Ralph de Baguley en 1517, en Ollerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1530, en Ollerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 28 años, y fue sepultada en Knutsford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
